projects.name: IncidentCopilot - Agentic AI Incident Triage System
projects.description: Production-deployed agentic AI system that helps engineers resolve production incidents faster by reducing MTTR by ~50%
projects.problem: Production incidents are time-critical. Engineers waste valuable time searching through runbooks, PagerDuty alerts, Slack threads to determine the next debugging step
projects.impact: 50% reduction in MTTR, 30% improvement in retrieval precision, 40% reduction in hallucinated outputs
key_features: PagerDuty webhook integration for real-time incident ingestion
Hybrid RAG pipeline: Semantic search (Titan Embed v2 + KNN) + Keyword search (BM25) + Cross-encoder reranking
Grounded responses backed by runbooks and past incidents
AWS Bedrock Guardrails to mitigate prompt-injection and hallucinations
projects.why_impressive: This is not a toy RAG app. It's a production agentic system with tool-calling, multi-step workflows, and real business impact. Shows deep understanding of: (1) LLM orchestration, (2) agentic AI patterns, (3) production systems thinking, (4) solving real engineer pain points

projects.name: FastAPI CRM Workflow Engine
projects.description: Built high-throughput CRM workflow engine for lead-to-case lifecycle management
projects.impact: Eliminated manual lead handling completely, optimized 60K+ CRM records, reduced API latency by 35%
key_features: Automated lead assignment, case creation, and routing
Optimized PostgreSQL schemas with pagination, filtering, RBAC

projects.name: RideShare: Scalable Database-as-a-Service
projects.description: Cloud-based DBaaS backend for ride-sharing application with dynamic auto-scaling
projects.impact: Request-volume-based auto-scaling, improved availability and load balancing
key_features: Docker SDK-based auto-scaling based on request volume
